ds-160.title: DS-160 (US Visa Application)
ds-160.shortDescription: Online Nonimmigrant Visa Application form for the United States
ds-160.longDescription: Form DS-160 is the standard online application form for nonimmigrant visas to the United States. It collects personal, travel, and security information required for visa processing.

faqs.question: How long is the DS-160 valid?
faqs.answer: The DS-160 is valid for 12 months from the date of submission.

faqs.question: Can I save and return to my DS-160?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can save your application using the Application ID provided at the start.

faqs.question: Do I need to print the confirmation page?
faqs.answer: Yes, you must bring the barcode confirmation page to your visa interview.

seo.metaTitle: DS-160 Form Guide & Auto-Fill: US Visa Application Assistant
seo.metaDescription: Complete your DS-160 US visa application online with AI-powered guidance. Step-by-step help for every field on the Nonimmigrant Visa Application form.

itr-1.title: ITR-1 (Income Tax Return - India)
itr-1.shortDescription: Income Tax Return for resident individuals with salary income
itr-1.longDescription: ITR-1 (Sahaj) is for resident individuals with total income up to ₹50 lakh from salary, one house property, and other sources.
itr-1.authority: Income Tax Department, Government of India

faqs.question: Who can file ITR-1?
faqs.answer: Resident individuals with income up to ₹50 lakh from salary, one house property, and other sources.

faqs.question: What documents do I need?
faqs.answer: Form 16, bank statements, investment proofs, TDS certificate.

faqs.question: When is the ITR deadline?
faqs.answer: Typically July 31st of the assessment year.

seo.metaTitle: ITR-1 Filing Guide: AI-Assisted Income Tax Return (Sahaj)
seo.metaDescription: File your ITR-1 (Sahaj) online with AI guidance. Step-by-step form filing for Indian salary earners with automatic deduction calculations.

passport.title: Passport Application (India)
passport.shortDescription: Apply for or renew an Indian passport online
passport.longDescription: Online application form for a new passport or renewal of an existing Indian passport under the Passport Seva system.
passport.authority: Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India

faqs.question: What documents are needed for a new passport?
faqs.answer: Aadhaar, birth certificate, address proof, and photographs.

faqs.question: How long does passport issuance take?
Can I renew my passport from abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, through the nearest Indian embassy or consulate.

seo.metaTitle: Indian Passport Application Guide: Online Form Assistant
seo.metaDescription: Apply for a new Indian passport or renewal with AI form-filling assistance. Step-by-step guidance through the Passport Seva online application.

income-certificate.title: Income Certificate Application
income-certificate.shortDescription: Apply for an income certificate from state/central authorities
income-certificate.longDescription: Online application form to obtain an income certificate required for education, government schemes, and employment benefits.

faqs.question: Who can apply for an income certificate?
faqs.answer: Any citizen who needs income proof for government benefits, education, or employment.

faqs.question: What documents are required?
faqs.answer: Aadhaar card, income proof, and address proof.

faqs.question: How long is the certificate valid?
faqs.answer: Typically 1-3 years, depending on the issuing authority.

seo.metaTitle: Income Certificate Application: Online Form Guide
seo.metaDescription: Apply for an income certificate online for education, government schemes, and employment benefits. AI-guided form-filling assistance.

scholarship.title: Scholarship Application (General)
scholarship.shortDescription: Apply for merit, need-based, or international scholarships
scholarship.longDescription: General scholarship application form suitable for national and international scholarship programs including merit-based, need-based, sports, and research scholarships.

faqs.question: What is the typical scholarship deadline?
faqs.answer: Deadlines vary by program, typically 6-12 months before the academic year starts.

faqs.question: Can I apply for multiple scholarships?
faqs.answer: Yes, but check each program's terms for combined awards.

faqs.question: What documents are typically needed?
faqs.answer: Transcripts, recommendation letters, statement of purpose, and financial proof.

seo.metaTitle: Scholarship Application Guide: AI-Powered Form Assistant
seo.metaDescription: Apply for scholarships online with AI-guided form filling. Supports merit, need-based, sports, research, and international scholarship applications.
